session.last_action: Phase 8: Block Production and Routing Automation. 543 tests, 13 agents, 9 workflows. do-gap workflow validated end-to-end. TUI step activity and output summaries implemented. Agent prompts rewritten with XML structure. Block validation always-rollback fix. Monitor enum values fixed.
